response.global_analysis: The video starts with the performance of 'あなたにこの言葉だけ言えてないです' followed by an MC segment. Audio phonetically matches the song title. Since reference lyrics were null, I transcribed the Japanese and translated it into English based on the audio. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal start and end points. The MC segment includes both English and Japanese speech, which I have transcribed and translated accordingly. Subtitles are kept under 50 characters per entry.

subtitles.original: 言えるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can say it

subtitles.original: 全てをひっくり返すくらいの
subtitles.english: To the point of turning everything upside down,

subtitles.original: 粋なセリフは言えそうにないや
subtitles.english: I don't think I can say any stylish lines

subtitles.original: どうしたってこの気持ちは
subtitles.english: No matter what, these feelings...

subtitles.original: 抑えられそうにはないんだ
subtitles.english: ...don't seem like they can be suppressed

subtitles.original: あなたと出会ったあの日から
subtitles.english: Since the day I met you,

subtitles.original: ずっと気持ちは変わらない けど
subtitles.english: my feelings haven't changed, but...

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです
subtitles.english: I can't say that I love you

subtitles.original: この気持ち伝わるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if these feelings will reach you

subtitles.original: 足踏みだって空回り
subtitles.english: My steps are just running in place,

subtitles.original: 何も言えずまたさよなら
subtitles.english: unable to say anything, goodbye again

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きすぎてたまらないんです
subtitles.english: I love you so much I can't stand it

subtitles.original: 明日こそは言いたいな
subtitles.english: I want to say it tomorrow for sure

subtitles.original: あなたも僕と同じように
subtitles.english: If you were in love just like me,

subtitles.original: 恋してたらなんて考えてる
subtitles.english: I'm thinking about it...

subtitles.original: でも分かってる
subtitles.english: But I know...

subtitles.original: 考えすぎってこと
subtitles.english: ...that I'm overthinking it

subtitles.original: Kobo-Kobo-Kobo-Kanaeru at your service!
subtitles.english: Kobo-Kobo-Kobo-Kanaeru at your service!

subtitles.original: Let me be your sun to shine your day!
subtitles.english: Let me be your sun to shine your day!

subtitles.original: Hehe!
subtitles.english: Hehe!

subtitles.original: Hi everyone! こぼんわ！ こぼ・かなえるです！
subtitles.english: Hi everyone! Kobon-wa! I'm Kobo Kanaeru!

subtitles.original: こぼの3D生誕配信へようこそ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to Kobo's 3D Birthday Stream!

subtitles.original: Welcome to Kobo Kanaeru's 3D Birthday Stream 2025!
subtitles.english: Welcome to Kobo Kanaeru's 3D Birthday Stream 2025!

subtitles.original: How was Kobo's performance? Hmm? Hmm?
subtitles.english: How was Kobo's performance? Hmm? Hmm?

subtitles.original: どうだった？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: またギターで出てきたよね。へへ。
subtitles.english: I came out with a guitar again, didn't I? Hehe.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って... Let me put the guitar down first.
subtitles.english: Wait a second... Let me put the guitar down first.

subtitles.original: よしよしよしよし... おんしょ...
subtitles.english: There we go... and heave-ho...

subtitles.original: Okay. Fuu... Hai!
subtitles.english: Okay. Phew... Alright!

subtitles.original: Once again, welcome to Kobo's 3D Birthday Stream 2025!
subtitles.english: Once again, welcome to Kobo's 3D Birthday Stream 2025!

subtitles.original: こぼの3D生誕配信へようこそ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to Kobo's 3D Birthday Stream!

subtitles.original: This time, I, Kobo, will be hosting an...
subtitles.english: This time, I, Kobo, will be hosting an...

subtitles.original: アイドルみたいコンサート themed 3D birthday stream...
subtitles.english: ...idol-like concert themed 3D birthday stream...

subtitles.original: ...for about an hour with many awesome guests!
subtitles.english: ...for about an hour with many awesome guests!

subtitles.original: I bet you guys can't wait! Ni-ni-ni-ni-ni!
subtitles.english: I bet you guys can't wait! *Giggles*

subtitles.original: Eh? Kobo, why is your stage different?
subtitles.english: Eh? Kobo, why is your stage different?

subtitles.original: Ah, chat, nice eyes, chat! You noticed it!
subtitles.english: Ah, chat, nice eyes, chat! You noticed it!

subtitles.original: Yeah, you're right! Look at Kobo's new stage!
subtitles.english: Yeah, you're right! Look at Kobo's new stage!

subtitles.original: Wah! でかい！ 新しいステージだよ！
subtitles.english: Wah! It's huge! It's a new stage!

subtitles.original: There's a big Cilus right here. Big Cilus.
subtitles.english: There's a big Cilus right here. Big Cilus.

subtitles.original: うにょうにょ うにょうにょ...
subtitles.english: Squish squish, squish squish...

subtitles.original: Hehe! And so many stars! Stars! So many stars!
subtitles.english: Hehe! And so many stars! Stars! So many stars!

subtitles.original: And then, a big, a big rainbow right here!
subtitles.english: And then, a big, a big rainbow right here!

subtitles.original: And so many clouds because... I don't know,
subtitles.english: And so many clouds because... I don't know,

subtitles.original: I think it's just very aesthetic. Yeah!
subtitles.english: I think it's just very aesthetic. Yeah!

subtitles.original: And the floor! Floor みて！ わー！
subtitles.english: And the floor! Look at the floor! Wah!

subtitles.original: なんかパターン... 海みたい。
subtitles.english: It's like a pattern... like the sea.

subtitles.original: You know? Yeah, like my hair! Hehe!
subtitles.english: You know? Yeah, like my hair! Hehe!

subtitles.original: So... um, don't forget to take a lot of screenshots,
subtitles.english: So... um, don't forget to take a lot of screenshots,

subtitles.original: especially later, okay? Get a lot of screenshots!
subtitles.english: especially later, okay? Get a lot of screenshots!

subtitles.original: And then post your comments, your moments,
subtitles.english: And then post your comments, your moments,

subtitles.original: And... right. Are you guys ready for the next performance?
subtitles.english: And... right. Are you guys ready for the next performance?

subtitles.english: Ready ready ready? Okay, let's go to the next performance!
